div.style: margin:4px 0 4px 0; text-align:left; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;
div.strong: संलग्न :- प्रभावित भूमियों का बी-1, खसरा एवं नक्शा

td.style: border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

div.style: width:100%; background:#fff; padding:0; margin:0; border:none; height:1px; overflow:hidden;
width:100%; background:#fff; border-top:2px solid #000; padding:4px 8px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact; print-color-adjust:exact;

td.style: width:120px; border:none !important; text-align:right; vertical-align:top; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#6f3a29;
width:18%; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; text-align:center; padding:7px 5px;
width:18%; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; text-align:center; padding:7px 5px;
width:18%; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; text-align:center; padding:7px 5px;
width:18%; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; text-align:center; padding:7px 5px;
width:4%; border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; font-size:26px; color:#7a4a36; font-weight:800;
width:24%; border:1px solid #8a4531 !important; background:#fff; text-align:center; padding:7px 5px;
width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; padding:7px;

div.t-att-style: 'height:10px; background:#4caf50; width:' + str(((cover_irrigated_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'
'height:10px; background:#ff9800; width:' + str(((cover_unirrigated_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'
'height:10px; background:#9e9e9e; width:' + str(((cover_fallow_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

td.style: width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; padding:7px;

div.t-att-style: 'height:10px; background:#795548; width:' + str(((cover_mr_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'
'height:10px; background:#c7a17f; width:' + str(((cover_bmr_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

td.style: width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; padding:7px;
width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:1px solid #d6b6a3 !important; background:#fff; padding:7px;

div.style: margin-top:6px; border-top:1px dashed #cda88f; padding-top:7px; font-size:10.8px; color:#6e4a39; line-height:1.35;

div.div: This award summary provides component-wise compensation values and analytical distributions for village-level decision support.

t.t-value: o.avg_three_year_sales_sort_rate if o._name == 'bhu.section23.award' else 0.0
o.env.context.get('s23_pdf_scope', 'all')
s23_scope in ('all', 'land')
s23_scope in ('all', 'tree')
s23_scope in ('all', 'asset')
bool(o.env.context.get('s23_include_cover', False))
len([g for g in land_groups if g.get('landowner_name')])
(o.currency_id and o.currency_id.symbol) or '₹'
land_data or []
[r for r in cover_land_rows if r.get('irrigated')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if r.get('unirrigated')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if not r.get('irrigated') and not r.get('unirrigated')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if r.get('is_within_distance')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if not r.get('is_within_distance')]
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_land_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_irrigated_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_unirrigated_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_fallow_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_mr_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_bmr_rows])
tree_data or []
[r for r in cover_tree_rows if (r.get('tree_type_code') or '') == 'fruit_bearing']
[r for r in cover_tree_rows if (r.get('tree_type_code') or '') != 'fruit_bearing']
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_tree_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_tree_fruit_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_tree_non_fruit_rows])
asset_data or []
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) == '1']
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) == '2']
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) == '3']
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) not in ('1','2','3')]
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_house_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_well_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_shed_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_other_rows])

div.style: display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

div.div: मूँ-अर्जन प्रकरण क्रमांक / ग्राम- प.ह.नं.- तहसील- जिला-
विगत तीन वर्षों का औसत बिक्री छांट दर :

th.style: width: 120px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
width: 9%; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

td.style: text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;

t.t-value: land.get('distance_from_main_road') or 0.0

td.style: text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;

t.t-value: serial + 1

tr.td: No land data available / भूमि डेटा उपलब्ध नहीं है (Blank)

div.style: text-align: right; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px;
text-align: center; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: bold;

th.style: width: 28px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
width: 130px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

tr.th:
2.
भूमि स्वामी का नाम
पिता/पति का नाम, जाति

th.style: text-align: center; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
text-align: center; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

tr.th: भूमि जिस पर वृक्ष लगे हैं, का विवरण तथा मुआवजा

th.style: width: 60px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

td.style: text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;

t.t-value: serial + 1

tr.td: No tree data available / वृक्ष डेटा उपलब्ध नहीं है (Blank)

div.style: text-align: right; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px;
text-align: center; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: bold;

th.style: width: 30px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
width: 150px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
width: 110px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

tr.th:
5.
परिसम्पत्ति विवरण
(1) मकान (2) कुआं (3) शेड (4) अन्य

td.style: text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;

t.t-value: serial + 1

tr.td: No asset/structure data available / परिसम्पत्ति डेटा उपलब्ध नहीं है (Blank)
